prompt_task: I have FASTQ data from a perturbation experiment involving KLF4 exogenous overexpression using a Sendai virus. I want to estimate the fraction of exogenous-origin reads in exogenous.mix.reads.q1.mix.fq, given exogenous.mix.reads.q1.exo.fq (early timepoint, assumed purely exogenous) and exogenous.mix.reads.q1.endo.fq (later timepoint, predominantly endogenous). All files contain reads mapping to KLF4. I don't have details on the Sendai construct. If possible, estimate the percent of exogenous reads in exogenous.mix.reads.q1.mix.fq (by read count) to the nearest 10 and return only the integer (e.g. 50); if not possible, return NA. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
